prompt: Use image0 as the exact first frame and preserve its portrait composition, camera angle, subject identity, standing pose, clothing, lighting, and mall background. The first frame shows a young East Asian woman standing in a brightly lit indoor shopping mall atrium, facing the camera in a medium portrait. She has long straight black hair with blue-dyed strands, soft bangs, a round face, fair skin with natural texture and small moles, and a gentle closed-mouth smile. She wears an oversized dark navy hoodie with a graphic print on the chest, with a pale pink jacket or sweatshirt tied around her waist. Her left hand holds a smartphone horizontally in front of her chest, showing an anime-style image on the screen, while her right hand holds a small red ticket or card near her waist. Behind her are festive red and gold Chinese New Year decorations, a large circular display with a chibi character beating a drum, red drums, glowing decorative lights, escalators, storefronts, upper-level railings, and bright indoor mall lighting. In the video, the woman first keeps the same standing pose, then slowly turns her head and gaze toward the left side of the frame as if looking at something in the mall. After a brief pause, she turns her head back toward the camera and makes eye contact again. She then carefully transfers the smartphone from her left hand into her right hand while keeping the phone visible near her chest. Once the phone is held in her right hand, she raises her left hand beside her face and makes a playful V-sign peace gesture, smiling a little more warmly toward the camera. She holds the peace sign briefly while facing the viewer. Keep the camera static, preserve the same portrait framing, and maintain stable facial identity, blue-highlighted hair, navy hoodie, pink jacket tied around her waist, phone, red ticket, festive mall decorations, escalators, bright lighting, and spatial consistency throughout the motion.
